variants: Nour Hamade was born in Basil Bay and has always been an active member of her community. She currently works at Iris Chain Logistics, using her skills in the Burmese script. A graduate of Keystone Arts Conservatory, Nour has incorporated her artistic background into her professional life. In her spare time, she volunteers with the Pineview Community Alliance, assisting in various local initiatives. Her commitment to fostering community ties is evident in all her endeavors.
